description: As the county seat of Blount County, Maryville is a busy hub of commerce and residential growth just south of Knoxville. Tristar Locksmith serves Maryville homes, apartment complexes, and businesses with the full range of locksmith services — from car lockouts and house lockouts to commercial lock hardware and master key systems. Our team is familiar with the Maryville area and can reach most locations within 30 minutes.
